main_finding: Imported assistant-work routes map cleanly to existing active skills and native lenses, but the active build does not yet have a route compiler that uses them.

recommended_next_implementation.ui_surface: Codex Chat inspector -> Route -> Assistant Work route
recommended_next_implementation.guard: candidate flag first; no registry or product front-door mutation

non_claims: This review does not create an active route compiler.
This review does not alter active skill or native lens registries.
This review does not accept candidate assistant-work routes as ION law.
